commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Go up to Hilkiah the high priest, that he may count the silver which is brought into the house of the LORD, which the keepers of the door have gathered from the people: Together, so as to be reduced into a mass, and refined by fire. (Pagnin) Septuagint, "seal up the money. "Protestants, "that he may sum the silver which "(Haydock) Let him make all be paid up that is due, (Piscator) and cease to demand any more. Door-keepers. Their office was of some consequence, 1 Paralipomenon ix.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
